---
title: "Contact"
output:
  html_document:
    self_contained: false
    always_allow_html: true
---

<div class="page-content">

&nbsp;
Alessandro Casa <br>

&nbsp;
Faculty of Economics and Management <br>

&nbsp;
Free University of Bozen-Bolzano <br>

&nbsp;
Piazzetta dell'Università 1, 39031 Brunico <br>

&nbsp;
**Office** 3rd Floor at NOI Techpark, via Europa 9, 39031 Brunico  <br>

&nbsp;
**Email** alessandro (dot) casa (at) unibz (dot) it

</div>
